# Soldier

- **Ability Scores:** Strength, Dexterity, Constitution
- **Feat:** [[savage_attacker]]
- **Skill Proficiencies:** [[athletics]], [[intimidation]]
- **Tool Proficiency:** Choose one kind of Gaming Set
- **Equipment:** Choose A or B: (A) [[spear]], [[shortbow]], [[arrow|20 Arrows]], Gaming Set (same as above), [[healer_s_kit|Healer's Kit]], [[quiver]], [[traveler_s_clothes|Traveler's Clothes]], 14 GP; or (B) 50 GP
